web-search.description: Web search for auditing bio pages, checking AI visibility, and researching competitors. Required for /audit-bio-page and /score-visibility commands.

google-business.description: Optional: Connect your Google Business Profile MCP server to push bio updates directly. See README for setup instructions.

zillow.description: Optional: Connect Zillow MCP server for profile syncing. Community MCP server — see README.

google-drive.description: Optional: Store bio versions and profile tracker in Google Drive for persistence across sessions.

slack.description: Optional: Post bio updates to a team Slack channel for review and approval workflows.
